name: Clanton 14th Street (4th Hood)
description: Approximately in 1975 Clanton started a fifth neighborhood in the North Hollywood area of Los Angeles just west of Burbank. Clanton was one of the first non-Valley neighborhoods to start a neighborhood in the Valley and two brothers from the 2nd Hood, Ernie "Big Cuate" and Ricky were the founders of the North Hollywood varrio.
